title: Dollar Rallies Toward Best Week Since March on Fed Hike View
title_cn: 美联储加息观点推动美元升至三月以来最佳单周
summary: The dollar is heading for its best week in over two months after US data showed price pressures that could push the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates over the next year.

title: Stocks Fall as Inflation Jitters Lift Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 通胀担忧提升债券收益率，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: A selloff in global bonds halted a rally in stocks, with concern intensifying that central banks will be forced to tighten policy to keep inflation in check amid persistently elevated oil prices.

title: Morgan Stanley Sees $200 Billion Hedging Flows Propping Up Euro
title_cn: 摩根士丹利预计 2000 亿美元的对冲资金将支撑欧元
summary: The euro could climb to levels last seen five years ago as a drop in hedging costs would drive flows of more than $200 billion and prop up the currency, according to Morgan Stanley.

title: We Can’t Just Ignore the Rise in Yields
title_cn: 我们不能忽视收益率的上升
summary: The 30-year yield nears its highest level since 2007.

title: Bond Futures at Risk From Rapid Hedging Overhaul as Yields Climb
title_cn: 随着收益率攀升，债券期货面临快速对冲改革的风险
summary: A global surge in yields is threatening to cause a disruption in the Treasury futures market — the principal tool for hedging US government bonds — as traders stand to overhaul their positions.

title: UBS's Hoffman-Burchardi: Markets Favor Active Investing
title_cn: 瑞银 (UBS) 霍夫曼-布尔查迪 (Hoffman-Burchardi)：市场青睐主动投资
summary: Ulrike Hoffman-Burchardi, global equities CIO at UBS Global Wealth Management, says that after a decade of mega cap dominance reinforced by passive investing, it's now time for active investing. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hedge Fund Founder Wins £1.6 Million After Ex-Employee’s Abusive Discrimination Case
title_cn: 对冲基金创始人在前员工虐待性歧视案中赢得 160 万英镑赔偿
summary: Claims of discrimination and harassment made against hedge fund founder Davide Leone were vexatious and had no reasonable prospect of success from the outset, a London judge ruled as he ordered Jacopo Moretti to pay over £1.6 million ($2.1 million) to his old boss.

title: Emerging Stocks Fall the Most Since March as Oil Jumps
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，新兴股市跌幅创三月以来最大
summary: Emerging-market stocks declined after two consecutive sessions of gains, pressured by rising oil prices and higher bond yields.

title: Global Bond Selloff Worsens as Rising Oil Prices Spook Investors
title_cn: 油价上涨令投资者恐慌，全球债券抛售加剧
summary: Government bond markets tumbled around the world, sending yields surging from Japan to the US on intensifying fears that the war-driven price shock will force central banks to raise interest rates to contain to the impact.

title: G-7 to Discuss Bond Selloff Sending Yields to Multi-Decade Highs
title_cn: 七国集团将讨论债券抛售，将收益率推至数十年高点
summary: Group of Seven finance chiefs are set to discuss the selloff in government bonds that’s sending yields on some benchmark securities to their highest levels in decades, with at least one member viewing the move as temporary.

title: Turkey’s Kontrolmatik Defaults on 450 Million Liras Debt
title_cn: 土耳其 Kontrolmatik 4.5 亿里拉债务违约
summary: Turkey’s Kontrolmatik Enerji ve Muhendislik defaulted on two separate lira bonds that matured on Friday, according to a statement by Turkey’s Central Securities Depository, marking a rare corporate debt default in the country’s local bond market.

title: Goldman Floats Risk Transfer Deal Tied to Private Market Loans
title_cn: 高盛提出与私募市场贷款挂钩的风险转移协议
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is sounding out investors about a significant risk transfer tied to a portfolio of loans to private market funds.

title: Colombian GDP Beats Expectations Ahead of Presidential Vote
title_cn: 总统投票前哥伦比亚国内生产总值超出预期
summary: Colombia’s economy grew faster than expected in the first quarter, potentially boosting President Gustavo Petro’s leftist ally in this month’s presidential vote.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/15/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Advent to Sell Up to €1.5 Billion of InPost Buyout Loan to Banks
title_cn: Advent 将向银行出售高达 15 亿欧元的 InPost 收购贷款
summary: Advent International LP seeks to sell about a third of a €4.2 billion ($4.9 billion) buyout loan for Polish parcel-locker company InPost SA to a group of banks, before the rest is marketed to institutional investors.

title: Oil Rises With US-Iran War Negotiations at Impasse
title_cn: 美伊战争谈判陷入僵局油价上涨
summary: Oil rose as the crucial Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed, with efforts to end the US-Iran war in limbo, prolonging disruptions that have upended global markets.

title: Barr Pushes Back on Proposals to Shrink Fed's Balance Sheet
title_cn: 巴尔拒绝缩减美联储资产负债表的提议
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr says shrinking the central bank's balance sheet is the "wrong objective." He spoke May 14 at a Money Marketeers of New York University event. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: These Memory Stocks Are Getting Cheaper Despite Scorching Rally
title_cn: 尽管反弹强劲，但这些内存股却变得越来越便宜
summary: Insatiable demand for memory chips has some of the industry’s top stocks defying the market’s math, becoming cheaper to own even as their share prices soar to nosebleed levels.

title: Dexcom’s Bet Beyond Diabetes
title_cn: Dexcom 的赌注超越糖尿病
summary: Dexcom CEO Jake Leach joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why continuous glucose monitors are becoming much bigger than diabetes devices. He says GLP-1 drugs are actually boosting CGM adoption and defends the company’s growth outlook. He also lays out Dexcom’s push into mainstream metabolic health and wellness. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ford Set for Worst Day Since 2024 as AI-Driven Rally Abates
title_cn: 随着人工智能驱动的拉力减弱，福特将迎来 2024 年以来最糟糕的一天
summary: Ford Motor Co.’s blistering rally screeched to a halt Friday, as a broader market selloff cooled enthusiasm over the automaker’s potential to benefit from the boom in energy demand for artificial intelligence.

title: Conference Board Sees Prolonged Inflation, Fed Holding Steady
title_cn: 世界大型企业联合会认为通胀将持续，美联储维持稳定
summary: The Conference Board Senior Economist Erin McLaughlin discusses the latest consumer spending trends amid the recent rise in inflation on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Dips Below $79,000 as Inflation Fears Hit Risk Assets
title_cn: 由于通胀担忧打击风险资产，比特币跌破 79,000 美元
summary: A selloff in risker assets like stocks swept up cryptocurrencies as concerns over inflation and high oil prices rattle jittery investors.

title: Shell Brazil’s Pinto da Costa Departs After Orca Oil Project Approval
title_cn: 壳牌巴西公司的 Pinto da Costa 在 Orca 石油项目获得批准后离开
summary: The head of Shell Plc in Brazil, who helped secure final approval for the Orca deepwater project, has decided to leave the oil major.

title: Warren Buffett, Steph Curry Lunch Auction Draws $9 Million Winning Bid
title_cn: 沃伦·巴菲特和斯蒂芬·库里午餐拍卖以 900 万美元中标
summary: An anonymous bidder paid $9 million for lunch with Warren Buffett, National Basketball Association champion Stephen Curry and actress and entrepreneur Ayesha Curry.

title: Fed Faces Regime Change as Powell's Chairmanship Ends
title_cn: 随着鲍威尔主席任期的结束，美联储面临政权更迭
summary: Bloomberg's Mike McKee discusses the challenges facing incoming Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aramco Opens Its Empire to Wall Street in $35 Billion Push
title_cn: 沙特阿美斥资 350 亿美元向华尔街开放其帝国
summary: Days after a BlackRock Inc.-led group signed an $11 billion lease agreement for some of Saudi Aramco’s natural gas facilities, the energy giant was inundated with calls from funds around the world eager for a slice of the business.

title: Gilts Slump as Investors Brace for Burnham Challenge to Starmer
title_cn: 投资者准备迎接伯纳姆对斯塔默的挑战，英国国债暴跌
summary: UK government bonds tumbled after Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham secured a pathway to potentially challenge Keir Starmer for the prime minister’s job, threatening a fresh bout of political instability that investors fear could result in more expansive fiscal policy.

title: Nigeria’s Oando Sees Iran War Windfall as Buyers Seek Safer Oil
title_cn: 买家寻求更安全的石油，尼日利亚 Oando 看到伊朗战争带来的意外收获
summary: Nigerian oil producer Oando Energy is witnessing a surge in revenue because of the Iran war, which has “shattered” the Gulf’s reputation as a safe place to operate, said Group Chief Executive Wale Tinubu.

title: SocGen Says 'Unhinged' Yields Pose Early Test for Warsh
title_cn: 法国兴业银行称“失控”的收益率对沃什构成早期考验
summary: Treasury yields are starting to become "unhinged,'' which will be a challenge for incoming Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh, according to Subadra Rajappa, the head of research for Societe Generale Americas. She speaks with Jonathan Ferro and Lisa Abramowicz on Bloomberg Television's "Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ray Dalio: 'Expect a Tribute System' as China Influence Grows
title_cn: 雷·达里奥：随着中国影响力的增长，“期待贡品制度”
summary: After spending time with leaders across Asia and China, Ray Dalio says the perception of American power is shifting fast. Countries that once relied on the US for security are recalibrating toward Beijing, and China sees itself entering a new era of influence rooted in its historical "tribute system." Meanwhile, Dalio says investors tracking the war in Iran are trading on cash flows, not fear, and they need diversification, liquidity, and gold to navigate what comes next. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple-OpenAI Alliance Frays
title_cn: 苹果与 OpenAI 联盟的争执
summary:
Apple Inc.’s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has become strained, according to people familiar with the matter, with the AI startup failing to see the expected benefits from the deal and now preparing possible legal action. 
Anurag Rana, Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst, joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MiniMed Aims to Be 'Self-Driving Car' of Diabetes Care
title_cn: MiniMed 旨在成为糖尿病护理的“自动驾驶汽车”
summary: Diabetes equipment provider MiniMed is aiming to be the “self-driving car” of insulin pumps, says its CEO, Que Dallara. Hot off the heels of the company’s IPO, Dallara speaks with Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Delivery Hero Shares Cap Best Week Ever as Breakup Odds Rise
title_cn: 随着分手几率上升，送货英雄分享了有史以来最好的一周
summary: Signs that Delivery Hero SE may be preparing to sell more assets have powered the beaten-down stock to the best week since its 2017 listing.

title: Inside Paul Tudor Jones’ Sports AI Startup
title_cn: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 的体育人工智能初创公司内部
summary: SumerSports, a startup founded by Paul Tudor Jones, is trying to transform football using artificial intelligence. SūmerSports CEO Lorrissa Horton joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how NFL teams are using frame-by-frame AI tracking for scouting, player development, predictive play analysis, and fan engagement. It's all powered by hedge-fund style analytics that was originally inspired by fantasy football. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revolut Offers All Staffers £1000 to Help Lure In New Business
title_cn: Revolut 向所有员工提供 1000 英镑以帮助吸引新业务
summary: Revolut Ltd. Chief Executive Officer Nik Storonsky is offering employees across the digital bank £1000 ($1,334) to woo more businesses to bank with Revolut, setting it as its highest priority to further boost the digital lender’s growth, valuation and revenue.

title: UnitedHealth Tracks Workers’ AI Use in Push to Transform Company
title_cn: UnitedHealth 追踪员工在推动公司转型过程中使用人工智能的情况
summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc. is tracking how often some employees use artificial intelligence tools as part of a push to embed the technology throughout its operations, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Hackers Armed With AI Stoke Fears for $130 Billion Crypto Sector
title_cn: 配备人工智能的黑客引发了对 1300 亿美元加密货币行业的恐惧
summary: The crypto hacks came a little over two weeks apart in April, netting the attackers almost $600 million in total while triggering an investor exodus from one major platform and causing another to fail.

title: Cerebras Pulls Back After IPO Day; Gemini Space Station Rises on $100M Investment | Stock Movers
title_cn: Cerebras 在 IPO 日后撤资；双子座空间站投资 1 亿美元崛起 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Gemini Space Station (GEMI) is rising after Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss made a $100 million “strategic investment” into the company. CEO Tyler Winklevoss said the investment will help fuel the company's ambition to evolve from a crypto company into a markets company.
- Magnum Ice Cream (MICC) shares are jumped as much as 22%, the most since the stock’s December listing, after Reuters reported that private equity firms including Blackstone and Clayton Dubilier & Rice are exploring potential bids for the company.
- Cerebras Systems (CBRS) shares pulled back after a huge IPO day yesterday. The shares jumped 68% in its trading debut after raising $5.5 billion in the year’s largest IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI, Robotics Key to Transforming Health Care: BD CEO
title_cn: BD 首席执行官：人工智能、机器人技术是医疗保健转型的关键
summary: Tom Polen, CEO of medical technology company BD, says that in the next decade AI and robotics will transform health care in ways that will make today’s system seem archaic. Polen sits down with Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SambaNova Challenges Cerebras Strategy
title_cn: SambaNova 挑战 Cerebras 战略
summary: SambaNova CEO Rodrigo Liang joined Bloomberg  Open Interest to explain why the next AI war won’t be about training models, but rather it will be about  inference costs, compute shortages, and who can scale AI infrastructure profitably. In a direct contrast with Cerebras after its blockbuster IPO, Liang breaks down the coming AI supply crunch, exploding enterprise demand, and why inference could become the biggest business in tech. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ackman Takes Microsoft Stake, Calls Tech ‘Deeply Embedded’
title_cn: 阿克曼入股微软，称科技“深度嵌入”
summary: Bill Ackman said Pershing Square has built a new stake in Microsoft Corp., taking advantage of a decline in the company’s share price to invest in a business that he said is stronger and more resilient than investors think.

title: Uber Rival Bolt, China’s Dongfeng Reach South Africa EV Deal
title_cn: Uber 竞争对手 Bolt、中国东风 Reach 南非电动汽车交易
summary: Bolt Technology OU agreed a deal with China’s Dongfeng Motor Group Co. to roll out an electric-vehicle fleet in South Africa that Yugo Rides will manage.

title: Everyday People Are Hurting. Why Are AI and Markets Still Booming?
title_cn: 每天人们都在受伤。为什么人工智能和市场仍然蓬勃发展？
summary:
As the Strait of Hormuz closure continues, the global energy crisis deepens, while inflation continues to rise and US consumer sentiment remains low. Why then, given all of this worrying news, is the stock market breaking records as tech companies continue to expand AI?

On this episode of the Everybody's Business podcast, we are joined by Kyla Scanlon, author of In This Economy? How Money & Markets Really Work. She tells Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith about the disconnect happening between Wall Street and main street and what could happen if and when there is an AI crash. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Tech, Chips Will Push Nasdaq to 30,000, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示，大型科技公司、芯片公司将推动纳斯达克指数升至 30,000 点
summary: Dan Ives of Wedbush Securities says the Cerebras Systems IPO is a watershed moment for the tech sector. He sees the Nasdaq hitting 30,000 in the next six to nine months. He has more on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Premarket Movers for May 15, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 5 月 15 日美国盘前走势
summary: S&P 500 Index futures fall 1% as of 7:48 a.m. in New York amid a broad global selloff in bonds.

title: Samsung Executives Make Rare Union Visit as Strike Fears Mount
title_cn: 随着罢工担忧加剧，三星高管罕见访问工会
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s top management made a rare visit to leaders of the company’s largest labor union late Friday in an effort to revive stalled wage negotiations after government-mediated talks collapsed earlier this week.

title: Trump Says He Discussed AI Guardrails, Nvidia’s Chips With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普称他与习近平讨论了人工智能护栏、英伟达芯片
summary: US President Donald Trump said he discussed guardrails on artificial intelligence with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, while adding that Nvidia Corp.’s H200 chips also came up during a two-day summit in Beijing.

title: Disney Digs In Against Pressure From Trump’s FCC
title_cn: 迪士尼顶住特朗普领导下的联邦通信委员会的压力
summary: The company is supporting ABC in a more spirited way than it did last year

title: India Moves to Buffer Economy Against Iran War Fallout
title_cn: 印度采取措施缓冲经济以应对伊朗战争的影响
summary: India’s government ramped up steps to curb foreign outflows and cushion the economy from the fallout of the Iran war.

title: UK Fund Seeks Removal of Two Executives at Japan’s Wacom
title_cn: 英国基金寻求解雇日本 Wacom 的两名高管
summary: A UK investment fund is urging shareholders of pen tablet maker Wacom Co. to remove two top executives over the Japanese company’s weak performance and unsuccessful management moves.

title: Hana Invests $670 Million in Crypto Exchange Operator Dunamu
title_cn: Hana 向加密货币交易所运营商 Dunamu 投资 6.7 亿美元
summary: Hana Bank, one of South Korea’s largest commercial lenders, has acquired a 1 trillion won ($670 million) stake in crypto exchange operator Dunamu, in the latest sign that the country’s banks are ready to embrace digital assets.

title: Technoprobe Shares Surge by a Record After Raising Guidance
title_cn: 提高指引后 Technoprobe 股价飙升创纪录
summary: Technoprobe SpA rose by a record amount after the Italian company  raised its guidance and said demand is surging for its semiconductor testing equipment.

title: Schneider Electric Chair on Geopolitics, AI, Africa’s Growth
title_cn: 施耐德电气地缘政治、人工智能和非洲增长主席
summary: Schneider Electric Chairman Jean-Pascal Tricoire discusses how geopolitical tensions are reshaping global energy production, the growth potential across the African continent, and the role of energy efficiency and AI in powering the continent’s future. He speaks with Bloomberg TV's Jennifer Zabasajja at the Africa CEO Forum in Kigali. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kioxia Preps US Listing After Riding AI Boom to Big Profit
title_cn: 铠侠在人工智能热潮中获得巨额利润后准备在美国上市
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp., the world’s best-performing major stock this year, said it would list its shares in the US as it reaps the benefits of a global memory chip shortage that’s ratcheted up prices of the vital component.

title: STT Global Data Centres Is Said to Plan $500 Million India IPO
title_cn: 据称 STT 全球数据中心计划在印度进行 5 亿美元的首次公开募股
summary: STT Global Data Centres India Pvt. is considering an initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $500 million, according to people familiar with the matter, as investor demand for digital infrastructure accelerates.

title: Enterprise 40% of Revenue Streams: OpenAI CRO
title_cn: 企业 40% 的收入来源：OpenAI CRO
summary: OpenAI CRO Denise Dresser said that the company’s enterprise business - which makes up 40% of its total revenue - has “incredible momentum” and was expected to reach 50% by the end of the year. Dresser made the comments in an exclusive interview with BTV’s Tom Mackenzie on Thursday.

title: Robot Makers Rule Hottest Asia Stock Trades on Physical AI Boom
title_cn: 机器人制造商在物理人工智能热潮中统治亚洲最热门股票交易
summary: Robotics has become one of the hottest stock themes in Asia as the artificial intelligence trade broadens beyond the region’s chipmakers.

title: Alphabet Sells Biggest Yen Bond on Record by Foreign Issuer
title_cn: Alphabet 发行外国发行人有史以来规模最大的日元债券
summary: Alphabet Inc. sold ¥576.5 billion ($3.6 billion) of bonds in the biggest ever yen deal by a non-Japanese company as competition to fund data centers and AI infrastructure intensifies.

title: China Calls for Hormuz Reopening | The China Show 5/15/2026
title_cn: 中国呼吁重新开放霍尔木兹海峡 |中国展 5/15/2026
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles and Yvonne Man give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CiDi Touts Benefits of Global Supply Chain Collaboration
title_cn: CiDi 宣扬全球供应链合作的好处
summary: Albert S. Hu, Executive Director & CEO of intelligent driving technology firm CiDi, discusses China's technological strengths and how companies like his benefit from partnerships between China and the rest of the world. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s More Than 3,700 Trades Included Nvidia, Boeing, Intel
title_cn: 特朗普的 3,700 多笔交易包括英伟达、波音、英特尔
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosures show that he or his investment advisers made more than 3,700 trades in the first quarter alone, a flurry that totaled in the tens of millions of dollars and involved major companies that have dealings with his administration.

title: Soybeans Fall as China Summit Leaves US Farmers Seeking Details
title_cn: 中国峰会让美国农民寻求细节，大豆价格下跌
summary: President Donald Trump’s trip to China offered little assurance to US farmers looking for concrete signs of a pickup in trade between the two countries.

title: Pound and Gilts Under Pressure Amid Starmer Uncertainty
title_cn: 斯塔默的不确定性使英镑和英国国债面临压力
summary: The British pound is heading for its worst week since 2024 against the US dollar and gilt yields surged as the pressure on UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer keeps building. Labour's Andy Burnham could try to get back to Westminster and make a run at Starmer. Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden has the latest from 10 Downing Street on "Bloomberg Brief." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Seeks to Verify Details of Ship Attack in Gulf of Oman
title_cn: 印度寻求核实阿曼湾船只袭击的细节
summary: India is examining the circumstances of an attack on a cargo vessel that caught fire before sinking in the Gulf of Oman, according to officials familiar with the matter.

title: China Criticizes EU Over Improper Jurisdiction in Nuctech Probe
title_cn: 中国批评欧盟对同方威视调查管辖权不当
summary: China’s Ministry of Justice said the European Union’s use of its foreign subsidies regulation in a probe of Chinese security firm Nuctech Co. constitutes improper extraterritorial jurisdiction and barred compliance with the measures.

title: Communist Cuba Is Leaning on Capitalists as Food and Oil Run Out
title_cn: 随着粮食和石油的耗尽，共产主义古巴正在依赖资本家
summary: Private businesses that emerged on the island despite years of persecution will be key to whatever comes next as Trump pushes to end 67 years of one-party rule.

title: Trump to Decide Soon on Taiwan Arms Sale, Noncommittal to Xi
title_cn: 特朗普将很快决定对台军售，但对习近平不置可否
summary: US President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese President Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island.

title: Trump, Xi to Set Up Trade and Investment Boards, China Says
title_cn: 中国称特朗普和习近平将设立贸易和投资委员会
summary: The US and China agreed to establish boards on trade and investment during this week’s summit, though President Donald Trump said he did not discuss a possible extension of his tariff truce when he met with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

title: Bolder Xi Moves to Corner Trump With ‘New Relationship’ Talk
title_cn: 习近平更大胆地用“新关系”谈话逼迫特朗普
summary: Before Donald Trump had even wrapped his two days of summitry and sightseeing in Beijing, Xi Jinping declared the visit a “historic” landmark in US-China ties despite the absence of any major deals or obvious breakthroughs.

title: Trump Says China Will Buy Over 200 Boeing Planes
title_cn: 特朗普称中国将购买200多架波音飞机
summary: President Donald Trump says the US made great trade deals with China during his meeting with Xi Jinping. He says China will buy over 200 planes from Boeing and possibly 750 more, but he provided no specifics. Trump also said China is buying engines from General Electric. He spoke to reporters on Air Force One Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boeing Gets China Deal at Trump’s Visit, With Many Questions
title_cn: 波音在特朗普访华期间与中国达成协议，但存在诸多疑问
summary: Boeing Co. appears to have secured its long-awaited order from China during US President Donald Trump’s visit to the country, but whatever accord was reached remained nebulous on numbers, aircraft type and a sense of timing.

title: Turkey Floats $1.2 Billion Fuel Pipeline to Eastern NATO Allies
title_cn: 土耳其向北约东部盟国提供价值 12 亿美元的燃料管道
summary: Turkey has proposed building a $1.2 billion (€1 billion) fuel pipeline for military use to help meet the energy needs of allies on NATO’s eastern European flank, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Modi Agrees With UAE to Build Strategic Crude, Gas Stockpiles
title_cn: 莫迪同意阿联酋建立战略原油和天然气库存
summary: India will partner with the United Arab Emirates to expand its strategic crude and gas reserves, a key step for the world’s third-largest oil consumer to guard against future supply disruptions.

title: Trump Says He Spoke to Xi About Guardrails for AI
title_cn: 特朗普称他与习近平谈论了人工智能的护栏
summary: US President Donald Trump says he discussed guardrails on artificial intelligence with Chinese leader Xi Jinping during a two-day summit in Beijing. Trump spoke to reporters in Air Force One Friday after leaving China.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He May Remove Some Iran-Linked Sanctions on China
title_cn: 特朗普称他可能会取消一些与伊朗有关的对华制裁
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s weighing whether to ease sanctions on Chinese oil companies that buy supplies from Iran, a move that would mark a concession to Beijing after his summit with President Xi Jinping.

title: Thiel-Backed Erebor Offers Venezuela Unlikely Banking Lifeline
title_cn: 泰尔支持的 Erebor 为委内瑞拉提供了不可能的银行业生命线
summary: Peter Thiel-backed startup Erebor Bank has pitched itself to top Venezuelan officials on restoring the sanctioned country’s access to the US financial system, an unexpected play by a new firm that’s stepping into a politically sensitive market many global banks still avoid.

title: Iran’s Latest Ship Seizure Is a Chinese-Owned Floating Armory
title_cn: 伊朗最新扣押的船只是一艘中国拥有的浮动军械库
summary: Iran seized a Chinese-owned ship that’s one of a handful of so-called floating armories that operate in the region, according to two maritime security consultants who asked not to be identified discussing sensitive information.

title: Winners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Beijing Summit Talks
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平北京峰会的赢家和输家
summary: Donald Trump got the pageantry he craved during his trip to China. But the US president concluded the summit largely where he began, receiving little help from his self-described “friend” Xi Jinping in dealing with a messy war in Iran and a challenging political climate at home.

title: US and Iran Appear to Postpone Uranium Talks Until Later Date
title_cn: 美国和伊朗似乎将铀矿谈判推迟到晚些时候
summary: The US and Iran appear to have put talks about Tehran’s stockpile of highly enriched uranium on the back-burner in an effort to end their war, with both sides suggesting it’s a subject for a later date.

title: UAE Tried in Vain to Get Saudis to Partner on Iran Response
title_cn: 阿联酋徒劳地试图让沙特合作应对伊朗问题
summary: The United Arab Emirates tried to persuade neighboring states including Saudi Arabia and Qatar to take part in a coordinated military response to Iran’s strikes and was left frustrated when they refused, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Germany’s Merz Says He Won’t Advise His Children Work in US
title_cn: 德国总理默茨表示不会建议孩子去美国工作
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said that he wouldn’t recommend his children go to live in the US because of what he described as a “social climate” that has suddenly taken hold.

title: UK Bars Foreign Far-Right Agitators Ahead of London Protest
title_cn: 英国在伦敦抗议前禁止外国极右煽动者
summary: The UK government has banned 11 foreign far-right agitators from entering the country ahead of a planned Unite the Kingdom march on Saturday orchestrated by Tommy Robinson.

title: Turkey Seeks to Assert Erdogan’s Power Over Contested Waters
title_cn: 土耳其寻求维护埃尔多安对争议水域的权力
summary: President Recep Tayyip Erdogan’s ruling AK Party is seeking to give him the power to declare an exclusive economic zone extending as far as 200 nautical miles (370 kilometers) from Turkey’s coast, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trump Says He Made No Commitment to Xi Over Taiwan
title_cn: 特朗普称他在台湾问题上没有向习近平做出任何承诺
summary: US President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese leader Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and said he would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island. Trump’s remarks aboard Air Force One came after Xi issued an unusually blunt warning that the two nations could descend into conflict if the Taiwan issue is mismanaged. Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern reports from Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Trump's Visit to China for a Summit with Xi Unfolded
title_cn: 特朗普访华与习近平峰会是如何展开的
summary: Pomp, toasts and Taiwan — US President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping met this week for a two-day summit in Beijing. Jeff Mason followed the action on the ground and caught a glimpse of how it unfolded. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Didn’t Ask Xi to Pressure Iran on Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普称他没有要求习近平在霍尔木兹海峡向伊朗施压
summary: President Donald Trump said China’s Xi Jinping largely agrees with him on the risks of Iran becoming a nuclear power but said he did not push his Chinese counterpart to pressure Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: India Fails to Bridge Divide Over Iran War at BRICS Summit
title_cn: 印度未能在金砖国家峰会上弥合伊朗战争分歧
summary: BRICS foreign ministers failed to reach a consensus at a meeting hosted by India, exposing deep divisions within the bloc over the conflict in Iran.

title: Burnham Faces Farage Showdown Before He Can Take On Starmer
title_cn: 伯纳姆在与斯塔默较量之前面临法拉奇对决
summary: Labour’s Andy Burnham is set to face off with Nigel Farage’s right-wing Reform UK as he attempts to win a seat in the House of Commons, a prerequisite for challenging Keir Starmer to achieve his ambition of becoming the UK’s next prime minister.
